/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AuFilDeLaVie.dir/main.cpp.o -o AuFilDeLaVie  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib/libraylib.dylib -framework IOKit -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/raylib/5.5/lib -lraylib
